pitch_text: Eden Gardens, Kolkata — Deep Dasgupta & Faf du Plessis: very high-scoring venue; quick outfield; not that big (65m one side, 64m other, 74m straight). Same pitch as other night — swung around; looks a bit drier, slow, dry patches on one side — spinners from that end. Batting-first venue: last six games, four wins batting first; KKR did that. Weather/rain — teams may prefer to chase (Duckworth-Lewis). High-scoring game expected; ball onto bat; watch new ball — might swing a little.
notes: Match 15: LSG won toss, chose to bowl → KKR bat first (team1). Impact pools — KKR: Manish Pandey, Vaibhav Arora, Tejasvi Dahiya, Rahul Tripathi, Tim Seifert. LSG: Ayush Badoni, Matthew Breetzke, Shahbaz Ahmad, Mayank Yadav, Himmat Singh. 11v11 Process 1A; registry ids (A Raghuvanshi, DS Rathi, M Siddharth); --no-squad-check if needed.
